_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: analysis of hematoxylin and eosin (H&E)–stained slides using the Indica Labs HALO DenseNet AI module...revealed a significant decrease in the percentage of abnormal tissue and a significant increase in the percentage of neuron cell bodies
details: Successfully analyzed H&E-stained slides to reveal significant decrease in abnormal tissue percentage and increase in neuron cell bodies in DKO mice
